text.title: ops-legal-compliance Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-legal-compliance as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent auto-applies a single cookie-banner pattern across all markets.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: EU requires opt-in; CCPA requires opt-out; Quebec Law 25 is hybrid. One pattern violates at least one regime.

failure-mode.description: Agent auto-publishes policy changes without a redline + human review gate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Silent policy edits hide changes from counsel, create litigation risk, and may violate user notification obligations.
